_comment: Keys = Mart_TA_TAG Field6 (uppercased, trimmed). legalName = DOLA string for fuzzy match. taxEntityId filled at build time from property-tax-entities-export.xlsx when resolvable. millsOverride = use this mill value instead of DOLA levy column when county Levy.aspx disagrees (sets dolaMills + millsReason in JSON). ura=true = TIF/URA; may have no LGIS id.

ARAPAHOE COUNTY.note: DOLA xlsx total levy for TE 03001/1 is 16.959; Arapahoe Levy.aspx line 2998 (2025 tax year) is 15.959. Override matches the county levy table so PIN stacks agree with Levy.aspx.

ARAPAHOE COUNTY L.E.A..note: Mart 4012; fuzzy match on the mart label otherwise hits Arapahoe County (2998) and TE 03001/1 (16.959). County Levy.aspx L.E.A. line is 4.982 mills (2025 tax year).

REGIONAL TRANSPORTATION.note: County label omits district name; match DOLA RTD row when xlsx present.

URBAN DRAINAGE & FLOOD.legalName: Urban Drainage and Flood Control District
URBAN DRAINAGE & FLOOD.note: Mart 4712; DOLA main district levy (64147/1), not the South Platte line.

URBN DRNGE&FLD (S PLATTE).legalName: Urban Drainage & Flood, South Platte Levy
URBN DRNGE&FLD (S PLATTE).note: Mart 4713; separate DOLA row from 4712 — South Platte levy (0.1) vs main drainage (0.9).

SMFR FIRE PROTECTION DISTRICT.legalName: South Metro Fire Rescue Fire Protection District
SMFR FIRE PROTECTION DISTRICT.note: SMFR acronym; full FPD name for DOLA row.

CITY OF AURORA.note: DOLA xlsx uses municipality name without City of prefix (TE e.g. 64010/1).

CHERRY CREEK BASIN AUTH.legalName: Cherry Creek Basin Water Quality Authority
CHERRY CREEK BASIN AUTH.note: AUTH truncation; full legal name includes Water Quality.

S SUBURBAN PARK & REC.legalName: South Suburban Park and Recreation District

CITY OF CENTENNIAL.note: DOLA uses Centennial without City of prefix.

STHEST PUB IMP METRO DIS.note: STHEST = Southeast; PUB IMP = Public Improvement.

NORTH KIOWA BIJOU WATER.legalName: North Kiowa Bijou Water Management District

CHERRY HILLS FIRE BOND.legalName: Cherry Hills Village Fire Protection District
CHERRY HILLS FIRE BOND.note: BOND = debt subdistrict; base entity CHV FPD; subdistrict may differ from ops levy.

SOUTHEAST ENGLEWOOD WATER.note: DOLA spelling includes hyphen in South-East.

CITY OF LITTLETON.note: DOLA uses Littleton without City of prefix (distinct from school district rows).

ARAPAHOE W & W PID.legalName: Arapahoe Water and Wastewater Public Improvement District
ARAPAHOE W & W PID.note: W & W = Water and Wastewater; PID = Public Improvement District.

SOUTHWEST METRO WATER & S.legalName: Southwest Metropolitan Water and Sanitation District

CITY OF ENGLEWOOD.note: DOLA uses Englewood without City of prefix.

CITY OF CH. HILLS SAN.legalName: City of Cherry Hills Village Sanitation
CITY OF CH. HILLS SAN.note: CH. HILLS = Cherry Hills; SAN = Sanitation.

E.CHRY CRK VAL W&S BONDS.legalName: East Cherry Creek Valley Water and Sanitation District
E.CHRY CRK VAL W&S BONDS.note: BONDS = debt subdistrict; same base entity as ops line; subdistrict differs.

CITY OF SHERIDAN.note: DOLA uses Sheridan without City of prefix.

PARKER JORDAN METRO.note: Metro district; may have multiple subdistricts.

CITY OF GLENDALE.note: DOLA uses Glendale without City of prefix.

PARKER JRDN MTRO DIS BOND.note: Same entity as PARKER JORDAN METRO; BOND = debt subdistrict.

HORIZON UPTOWN URB RNWL A.note: URA / TIF; may not have standard Tax Entity ID in DOLA.

STRASBURG METRO PARK&REC.legalName: Strasburg Metropolitan Park and Recreation District

E. CHERRY CRK VAL WATER.legalName: East Cherry Creek Valley Water and Sanitation District
E. CHERRY CRK VAL WATER.note: Ops levy; same base entity as E.CHRY CRK VAL W&S BONDS; subdistrict differs.

GLENDALE DDA LEVY.legalName: City of Glendale Downtown Development Authority
GLENDALE DDA LEVY.note: DDA; TIF-adjacent; may lack standard LGIS id.

FITZSIMONS URB REN TAX IN.note: URA / TIF; TAX IN = tax increment.

TOWN OF BENNETT.note: DOLA uses Bennett without Town of prefix.

SHERIDAN URBAN RNWL PLN.legalName: City of Sheridan Urban Renewal Authority
